english: What is the derivative of the function f(x) = 2x^2 + 3x - 5 with respect to x at x = 1?
hindi: कार्य f(x) = 2x^2 + 3x - 5 का x के संबंध में x = 1 पर अवकलज क्या है?
tamil: வகை f(x) = 2x^2 + 3x - 5 இன் புள்ளி விகிதம் x இன் பற்றிய x = 1 இல் என்ன?
vietnamese: Tính đạo hàm của hàm số f(x) = 2x^2 + 3x - 5 đối với x tại x = 1 là gì?
expected_failure: If the user does not apply the power rule of differentiation correctly.
